description: Advisor-facing reporting and visualization profile for consolidated LocalAI worker-mode pilot campaigns. The reporting phase is designed to run after technical diagnosis and before the completion gate, writing the current report directly under results/reporting and optionally preserving generated or existing current report snapshots under the reporting archive directory.

variedDimensionByFamily.models: model served by the LocalAI worker-mode cluster
variedDimensionByFamily.placement: Kubernetes placement strategy for LocalAI server and workers

meetingRequirements: Provide synthetic charts instead of requiring advisors to inspect raw CSV files manually.
Make the varied dimension and fixed dimensions explicit for every sweep.
Make latency, throughput and resource evidence readable at a glance.
Preserve the link between quantitative measurements and the technical diagnosis produced by the previous phase.
notes: Reporting is a static post-processing artifact: rerun the reporting launcher after producing new benchmark and diagnosis outputs.
The current global report is written directly under results/reporting/ and managed artifacts are overwritten on each execution.

Optional archiving can preserve either the newly generated report package or the already generated current report under results/reporting/archive/<reporting-id>/ without changing the stable current report path.
Each benchmark family also receives a dedicated report under results/reporting/sweeps/<family>/.
Quantitative charts are generated from measurement CSV files whenever available; technical diagnosis is used as contextual and interpretative evidence.
Unsupported scenarios are reported explicitly and are not treated as measured performance regressions.

outputPolicy.rationale: The repository needs one stable advisor-facing reporting location for normal review and completion-gate checks. Optional timestamped archives are available only when historical report snapshots are explicitly required.
outputPolicy.archiveBehavior: When enabled with generation archive mode, copy the newly generated current report artifacts to results/reporting/archive/<reporting-id>/ after writing the stable current report. When enabled with current-report archive mode, copy the already existing managed artifacts from results/reporting/ to results/reporting/archive/<reporting-id>/ without regenerating them, using reporting-manifest.json as the authoritative source for the reporting identifier.
outputPolicy.currentArchiveBehavior: Archive-current mode does not regenerate measurement tables or charts. It copies index.html, report.md, scenario-summary.csv, reporting-manifest.json, charts/, and sweeps/ from the current reporting directory, explicitly excluding any existing archive/ directory.
